_comment: Phase 2 / Gate 2 evidence manifest — detection core (deterministic, no LLM). Parsed fail-closed against the Phase-1 oracle. Each criterion maps to a vitest test id + a JSON artifact. The detection engine decides ONLY from C1 telemetry; it MUST NOT import oracle ground-truth.

criteria.title: Intermittent (every-N / header-only / first-4KB) detected via format-validation/fusion, NOT entropy alone
criteria.expected: MASS_ENCRYPTION for each intermittent mode; format-validation signal load-bearing

criteria.title: Every ISOLATE_HOST verdict has corroborating_count>=2 OR fast_path=true
>=20 behaviors/families and >=4 evasion modes covered, detection rate reported
criteria.expected: families>=20 AND modes>=4; rate reported (not asserted as fixed %)

criteria.title: Allow-list suppression for known high-entropy apps; auditable; load-bearing
criteria.expected: allow-listed FDE not flagged; WITHOUT allow-list it WOULD be flagged (proves load-bearing); suppression auditable
